name: Raspberry Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetable oil, raspberry vinegar, granulated sugar, finely minced fresh parsley, heaping teaspoon of minced shallots, ¼ teaspoon salt, and ⅛ teaspoon dry mustard in a shaker jar.
2. Securely cover the shaker jar with a lid.
3. Gently shake the mixture until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Alternatively, add the same ingredients to a 2-cup glass measuring cup and whisk them together until smooth.
5. Transfer the mixture to a storage container and refrigerate until ready to use.
6. Before using, give the vinaigrette a final shake or whisk to ensure everything is thoroughly mixed.
7. This recipe makes about 1 cup of raspberry vinaigrette.
